name: szilard_record_ordering_refinement_sweep
classification_note: Second-order ordering refinement sweep on top of the hard-reset Szilard record carrier. It narrows the search around the best ordering-amplified setting and adds feedback duration and barrier depth as explicit axes.

summary.scope_note: Local refinement sweep around the best ordering-amplified hard-reset Szilard carrier. It adds feedback duration and barrier depth to test whether ordering can be pushed past the remaining gap without losing measurement or survival quality.
